holdings.infoBox: IGF is an equity ETF with a total of 97 individual holdings. The top holdings are Transurban Group stock at 5.31%, Aena S.M.E. at 5.19%, NextEra Energy at 4.68%, Enbridge at 4.02%, and Iberdrola at 4.00%.

overview.description: The iShares Global Infrastructure ETF (IGF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Global Infrastructure index, a market-cap-weighted index of global infrastructure companies. IGF was launched on Dec 10, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: ETFs to watch at amid bipartisan infrastructure deal
data.text: Tom Lydon, ETF Trends CEO, joins Yahoo Finance to discuss infrastructure ETFs amid Biden's announcement on infrastructure deal. Watch the 2021 Berkshire Hathaway Annual Shareholders Meeting on YouTube...

data.title: 3 Infrastructure ETFs to Capture Trillions in Spending
data.text: Congress will negotiate President Biden's $2.25 trillion infrastructure bill this summer. These infrastructure ETFs could benefit from the huge spending plan.

data.title: ETFs to watch as the economy moves toward reopening with ETF.com
data.text: Yahoo Finance's Alexis Christoforous and Kristin Myers discuss ETFs to watch with Cinthia Murphy, Managing Editor of ETF.com.

data.title: Global Infrastructure Investments Poised for 2021 Gains
data.text: Charts in this article suggest that it could be a good idea to include global infrastructure as part of asset allocation strategies for 2021.

data.title: Here’s how to use ETFs to prepare for a Biden presidency
data.text: It could be "Infrastructure Week" for four years if the Democratic contender takes the White House. Here's how to invest for that possibility.

data.title: Infrastructure ETF Builds Investors a Bridge to Global Large Caps
data.text: The ETF industry has something for everyone -- the iShares Global Infrastructure ETF (ticker: IGF) gives investors global exposure to mainly large-cap infrastructure companies.
